message:
feat(db,server): harden reservation release with RETURNING clause and overhaul web dashboard performance

DB changes:
- cache.rs: Fix test lock guards to use write() instead of read() where
  mutable bindings are required, preventing potential deadlocks.
- queries.rs: Replace traw_execute with traw_query using RETURNING
  reservation_id on release SQL, adding explicit ID verification to
  catch silent reservation-release mismatches with proper rollback.

Web dashboard overhaul (tui_web_dashboard.rs):
- Replace per-request JSON serialization with pre-built Arc<str> responses
  computed at capture time (zero-alloc HTTP serve path).
- Add delta mode: only changed cells are sent when dimensions are stable,
  reducing payload size for mostly-static screens.
- Encode cell data as base64 instead of JSON number arrays, cutting
  snapshot payload size ~60%.
- Client-side: use ImageData for background fills instead of per-cell
  fillRect, decode base64 directly to Uint32Array, apply delta patches.
- Convert HTML template from format!() with escaped braces to a static
  string literal, eliminating per-request format overhead.
- Replace WebDashboardFrame public struct with internal FrameState,
  exposing cached_snapshot()/cached_delta()/snapshot_seq() accessors.
- Add unit tests for base64 encoding, unchanged_response format.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
